meta.title: Mellow · Migraine tracker
meta.description: Finally understand what triggers your migraines. Mellow helps you log your attacks and reveal the links between the pain and your daily life.
meta.ogDescription: Take back control of your migraines. A calm, free app to support you every day.

blog.indexSubtitle: Everything to better understand your migraines
blog.emptyState: No articles yet. Check back soon.
blog.ctaTitle: Take back control of your migraines
blog.ctaSubtitle: Download Mellow and start understanding what triggers your attacks.

hero.title: Take back control of your migraines.
hero.subtitle: Mellow helps you understand them and get through them.

mellows.title: Meet the Mellows.
mellows.subtitle: Each Mellow is there for a different moment.

rose.name: Mellow Pink
rose.description: Here for you when the pain is mild. Those quieter moments deserve attention too.

bleu.name: Mellow Blue
bleu.description: A gentle companion when the pain sets in. You don't have to go through it alone.

rouge.name: Mellow Red
rouge.description: Stays with you when the pain peaks. Even in the hardest moments, it's there.

logging.description: During an attack, every second counts. Log a migraine in two taps and add the details later.

triggers.title: Trigger tracking
triggers.description: Stress, sleep, screens, cycle… Mellow reveals what triggers your attacks.

pressure.title: Atmospheric pressure
pressure.description: Automatic weather tracking to uncover invisible patterns.

stats.description: Calendar, average duration, intensity, trends over 1, 3 or 12 months. Your full history at your fingertips.

courses.title: Learn to live better with migraines.
courses.subtitle: Everything you need to know about migraines, explained simply.

understand.title: Understand
understand.subtitle: The mechanisms, the phases, and what happens in your brain.

prevent.title: Prevent
prevent.subtitle: Routines, lifestyle, and warning signs to recognize.

manage.title: Manage
manage.subtitle: The methods that truly work during an attack.
